title: Meta: Agent audit — align persistent agents (identity/soul/docs)

context.description:
Objective: audit all persistent agents (main/Luna, Luan, crypto-sage, quant-strategist, dispatcher/cto-ops) to reduce recurring failures and align with upcoming autonomy goals.

Approach: read each agent’s identity + operating docs (SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, USER.md, AGENTS.md, memory/lessons.md and any
